nasb.text: The word which the Lord spoke concerning Babylon, the land of the Chaldeans, through Jeremiah the prophet:

esv.text: The word that the Lord spoke concerning Babylon, concerning the land of the Chaldeans, by Jeremiah the prophet:

cnv.text: 以下是耶和華藉耶利米先知論到巴比倫，就是迦勒底人的地所說的話。

ccb.text: 论到迦勒底人居住的巴比伦，耶和华对耶利米先知说：
